STEP 942 — Deep Collatz Sub-class Descent Theorems (n%8192 level)
  藤本伸樹 2026-04-21

  Systematic modular search at n%8192 within hard residues n%256∈{71,103,167,231}.
  Excludes sub-classes already covered at lower moduli (step938/939).

  NEW THEOREMS (19 total at n%8192 level):
  All use factor 3^8/2^13 = 6561/8192 ≈ 0.801 < 1
  K=21 steps (8 odd + 13 halvings)

  By base class:
